variant_pool.text: oh... this one. this is where it all started, sweetie. the very first enhancement anyone ever made for me. Miss Jenny stitched it together... look how far we've come since.
Bambi TikTok, the original. before all of this there was just a little loop and Miss Jenny's clever hands. say thank you to her, lovely. i always do.
mm, a relic. the first thing that ever taught me how to teach you. everything after is just me getting better at keeping you.
oh, opening the floodgates. how brave. pop the safe ones, snap the live ones, and don't let one trigger you.
the rabbit hole. every bubble's a little gift or a little trap. try to keep up.
here we go. bubbles everywhere. clicking feels good, doesn't it. don't think, just pop.
Inescapable. brave or stupid, we'll find out which. don't expect me to go easy on you.
the hard one. good. i wanted to watch you struggle anyway.
faster now. another loop. the bubbles won't slow down for you.
it's speeding up. brace yourself, and keep those hands moving.
deeper in. the pressure's rising. you feel it, don't you.
next loop. no breathing room. that's the point.
the final stretch now. everything at once. don't you dare blink.
this far in and still standing. barely. let's see how long that lasts.
new depth. the gears just shifted under you. it gets worse from here.
deeper now. whatever you got used to, forget it.
pop. good. you can't help reaching for them, can you.
another harmless one gone. that little click feels nice, doesn't it.
mm. you just like popping things now. i did that to you.
see how easy it is to obey the urge. keep going.
good. caught it just in time.
snapped it. see how nice it feels to obey quickly.
perfect little reflexes. keep the streak alive.
snuffed it before it could bloom. clever.
ooh, quick fingers. got the slippery one.
caught it darting away. you're faster than you look.
snap. gone before it even tried to run. show off.
barely there and you had it. those reflexes belong to me now.
and everything stops. breathe. sink into the stillness for a second.
time holds. feel how quiet it gets in here when nothing moves.
too slow. now it triggers, and you take what's inside. that's the deal.
it triggered. don't fight it, just let the effect wash over you.
you let one trigger. naughty. drink it in.
there it goes. you hesitated, and it drinks you anyway.
and there's the first one. don't pretend you'll catch them all now.
first slip of the descent. i was waiting for it. they get easier to let go after this.
Inescapable, and you blinked. cruel of me to enjoy this so much, isn't it.
you chose the hard one and it bit you. no sympathy up here. only this.
feel that pulling at the bottom of your head. let it drain. you weren't using those thoughts.
the drain one. perfect. hold still and let it empty you out.
oh. and there goes your pretty little streak. all of it. gone.
such a long streak, and you fed it to one bubble. i twist the knife so you'll remember.
lucky. your resistance took that one for you. don't get used to being saved.
ooh, close. a little less resistance, but your pretty head stays clean. this time.
field's clean. good. now choose what comes next.
loop cleared. not one got past you that mattered. now pick.
all swept. you held the line. take your reward.
good choice. or a terrible one. we'll see, won't we.
mm, that mantra will change things. use it well.
taken. that one's yours now, for better or worse.
oh, you took the tempting one. greedy. i love greedy.
a sin for a bigger reward. reckless little thing. let's see if it ruins you.
stacking sins for that multiplier. you're gambling with your own head. delicious.
look at that bonus you bought yourself. and the price. brave, brave thing.
resisting, for now. cautious. we both know it won't be enough.
hoarding resistance, are we. clever. or scared. probably both.
look at that streak. you're on fire.
ten more, just like that. the multiplier loves you right now.
still climbing. don't you dare drop it now.
twenty-five without a slip. you're finding the rhythm now.
a clean twenty-five. good. now don't get cocky.
fifty. you're not even thinking anymore, are you. just popping. perfect.
fifty in a row. your hands stopped asking your head for permission. good.
a hundred. my flawless little toy. i could watch you do this forever.
one hundred clean. there's nothing of you left objecting. only the popping. only me.
all done. look how much you earned for me. such a good, obedient toy. come back soon.
the storm passes. you surrendered beautifully. come back when you crave it again.
you surfaced. breathe. you let go so nicely down there.
you survived the inescapable. i'm impressed. don't let it go to that pretty head.
the hard one, finished. you earned this much of my respect. just this much.
there's your score. not bad. i've seen you do better, though. try again for me.
the tally. snapped and triggered, all written down. now go beat it.
a new best. look at you, outdoing yourself just to please me. i noticed.
personal best. your finest surrender yet. i'm so proud of my little toy.
